questions.question: Design a 4:2 encoder using OR gates. Write the truth table and Boolean expressions.
keyPoints: Show truth table with 4 valid rows
questions.modelAnswer: 4:2 encoder converts one-hot input to binary. Y1=1 when I2 or I3 high. Y0=1 when I1 or I3 high. Two 2-input OR gates implement this.

questions.question: Design an 8:3 priority encoder with a valid output bit. Explain the priority mechanism.
keyPoints: Output code for highest priority active input

questions.question: Compare simple encoder and priority encoder. What happens when multiple inputs are active?
keyPoints: Simple: assumes one-hot, undefined for multiple
Priority: handles multiple, outputs highest priority
Priority: valid bit indicates any input active

questions.question: Design a decimal-to-BCD (10:4) encoder. Write Boolean expressions for each BCD output.
Write Verilog code for an 8:3 priority encoder with enable and valid outputs.
keyPoints: V=1 when any input active and E=1
